content.problemStatement: Print **"Learn Coding on CodeChef"** to the console.
content.outputFormat: Print the string "Learn Coding on CodeChef" exactly.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required phrase.
No input is needed; the output is always the same.
Repeated test to confirm consistent output.

solution.approach: The task is trivial: there is no input, and the program must output the fixed phrase "Learn Coding on CodeChef". The solution simply writes this constant string to standard output. No computation, loops, or conditionals are needed.

code.Python3:
import sys
sys.stdout.write("Learn Coding on CodeChef\n")
code.JavaScript:
const fs = require('fs');
console.log('Learn Coding on CodeChef');
